mobile-banking-app.title: Mobile Banking App
mobile-banking-app.shortDescription: A full-featured banking application with real-time transaction updates, secure authentication, and intuitive financial dashboards.
mobile-banking-app.fullDescription: A comprehensive mobile banking solution built with Flutter, providing users with seamless access to their financial accounts. The app features real-time transaction updates, secure biometric authentication, intuitive financial dashboards with spending analytics, and support for various banking operations including transfers, bill payments, and account management.
features: Interactive spending analytics and budgeting tools
Secure money transfers and bill payments
mobile-banking-app.challenges: Implementing robust security measures while maintaining a smooth user experience was the primary challenge. We used multi-layer encryption, secure token storage, and implemented real-time fraud detection algorithms.
mobile-banking-app.outcome: Successfully launched with 50K+ downloads in the first month, maintaining a 4.8-star rating. Reduced transaction processing time by 40% compared to legacy systems.

ecommerce-platform.title: E-Commerce Platform
ecommerce-platform.shortDescription: Cross-platform mobile marketplace with product browsing, shopping cart, payment integration, and order tracking.
ecommerce-platform.fullDescription: A fully-featured e-commerce mobile application that provides a seamless shopping experience. Built with Flutter for cross-platform compatibility, integrated with Firestore for real-time data synchronization, and Stripe for secure payment processing.
features: Secure payment processing with multiple methods
Push notifications for deals and updates
ecommerce-platform.challenges: Managing complex state across multiple screens and ensuring smooth performance with large product catalogs required careful architecture planning and optimization.
ecommerce-platform.outcome: Achieved 100K+ active users within 3 months, with average session duration of 12 minutes and conversion rate of 3.5%.

main.name: Aqeel Ahmad
main.title: Software Engineer specializing in Flutter
bio: I'm a passionate Software Engineer with expertise in building high-quality mobile applications using Flutter. With years of experience in mobile development, I focus on creating scalable, performant applications with clean architecture.
My approach combines technical excellence with user-centric design, ensuring that every product I build not only works flawlessly but also delivers an exceptional user experience.
I'm constantly learning and exploring new technologies to stay at the forefront of mobile development innovation.

main.heading: Hi, I'm Aqeel – a Software Engineer specializing in Flutter
main.description: I create high-quality, scalable mobile apps with smooth performance and intuitive design. My focus is on building reliable products that users love.

notes.timestamp_fields: In Firestore console, use 'timestamp' type for createdAt and updatedAt fields
notes.arrays: Use Firestore's array type for tags, features, bio, and skills
notes.maps: Use Firestore's map type for nested objects like technologies array items and skills array items
notes.order_field: The 'order' field in projects controls the display order (lower numbers appear first)
notes.optional_fields: Fields marked as optional in the schema can be omitted if not needed
